docs.title: Rohith Kumar Prasanna Kumar
docs.text:
Senior QA Engineer | AI & Automation Expert

📍 Gdańsk, Poland | 📞 +48 881 046 707 | ✉️ rkrohithkumar@gmail.com

docs.title: About Me
docs.text:
I'm a Senior Quality Assurance Engineer with 9+ years of experience in Python test automation, distributed systems, and AI-driven testing.

Currently at WithSecure (cybersecurity EDR/XDR), leading QA across multiple teams and mentoring junior engineers.

Previously at Intel (Division Recognition Award winner) and Aptiv (autonomous vehicles).

docs.title: What I Do
docs.text: Area Technologies Test Automation Python, Robot Framework, Selenium, Pytest Cloud & DevOps AWS, Azure, Docker, Jenkins, Git Security EDR/XDR, Kali Linux, Metasploit AI/ML Anomaly Detection, Predictive Models

docs.title: WithSecure (2022 – Present)
docs.text: Senior Software Engineer in Test - QA across multiple teams and Products - AI based predictive models and automation

docs.title: Intel (2021 – 2022)
docs.text: ASIC Design Engineer - Intel Division Recognition Award - Validated 25.6 Tbps Ethernet switches

docs.title: Aptiv (2019 – 2020)
docs.text: Test Team Lead - Led testing for autonomous vehicle projects
